In rerun::external::re_log_types::external::arrow2::array::growable

?

Struct rerun::external::re_log_types::external::arrow2::array::growable::GrowableBinary

pub struct GrowableBinary<'a, O>where
    O: Offset,{
    arrays: Vec<&'a BinaryArray<O>, Global>,
    data_type: DataType,
    validity: MutableBitmap,
    values: Vec<u8, Global>,
    offsets: Offsets<O>,
    extend_null_bits: Vec<Box<dyn Fn(&mut MutableBitmap, usize, usize) + 'a, Global>, Global>,
}
Expand description

Concrete Growable for the BinaryArray.

Fields§

§arrays: Vec<&'a BinaryArray<O>, Global>§data_type: DataType§validity: MutableBitmap§values: Vec<u8, Global>§offsets: Offsets<O>§extend_null_bits: Vec<Box<dyn Fn(&mut MutableBitmap, usize, usize) + 'a, Global>, Global>

Implementations§

§

impl<'a, O> GrowableBinary<'a, O>where O: Offset,

pub fn new( arrays: Vec<&'a BinaryArray<O>, Global>, use_validity: bool, capacity: usize ) -> GrowableBinary<'a, O>

Creates a new GrowableBinary bound to arrays with a pre-allocated capacity.

Panics

If arrays is empty.

Trait Implementations§

§

impl<'a, O> From<GrowableBinary<'a, O>> for BinaryArray<O>where O: Offset,

§

fn from(val: GrowableBinary<'a, O>) -> BinaryArray<O>

Converts to this type from the input type.
§

impl<'a, O> Growable<'a> for GrowableBinary<'a, O>where O: Offset,

§

fn extend(&mut self, index: usize, start: usize, len: usize)

Extends this Growable with elements from the bounded Array at index index from a slice starting at start and length len. Read more
§

fn extend_validity(&mut self, additional: usize)

Extends this Growable with null elements, disregarding the bound arrays
§

fn len(&self) -> usize

The current length of the Growable.
§

fn as_arc(&mut self) -> Arc<dyn Array>

Converts this Growable to an Arc<dyn Array>, thereby finishing the mutation. Self will be empty after such operation.
§

fn as_box(&mut self) -> Box<dyn Array, Global>

Converts this Growable to an Box<dyn Array>, thereby finishing the mutation. Self will be empty after such operation
